project_description: Offer Consultation Sessions (2-hours each) to 2 NGOs

organization.name: Time Auction
organization.description: Time Auction is a charity that advocates volunteerism. We encourage volunteering with inspiring experiences, while connecting skilled-volunteers with NGOs. By volunteering at any nonprofits, one can earn unique access to their passions — from learning to cook from Michelin-starred chefs to dining with inspiring entrepreneurs. With our volunteer community, we also match professionals who want to volunteer their talent with nonprofits that need those skills. Over 100,000 volunteer hours have been contributed to date since 2014.

what_we_need: Share your bio and topic of expertise with NGOs through our platform, allowing NGOs to apply for a one-on-one Consultation Session with you

Share your advice and insights on using No-code tools and/or Generative AI to improve and streamline operation process, such as setting up the system for data management, social media marketing, event planning etc.
You'll review the NGO's strategy and progress, and suggest next steps, helping them drive better decisions and seek relevant future support
By accepting the NGO's application, you'll both be connected and can schedule for the call
*Extensive experience on the topic proposed is required for this project
project_details.background: At Time Auction, we're running a pilot program to better connect skilled volunteers with NGOs, and are looking for volunteers to help us with this program in the next 2-4 months. As you may know, our platform helps 880+ NGOs recruit skilled volunteers. Currently, NGOs post projects and volunteers apply to projects that fit their skills. Our new feature will help them connect even more efficiently, by featuring volunteers who can offer Advisory/Consultation sessions for NGOs to apply, which will help them review their progress, identify gaps and drive better decisions.
project_details.what_we_have: More details about the program and guidance for the advisory session will be provided. You can see the program details here: https://timeauction.org/en/calls/program_page
project_details.why_important: There are 880+ NGOs on our platform now and many more are signing up, your support will help us reach more skilled-volunteers that can help these NGOs.

special_program.name: Swire Trust Go-Givers Program
special_program.description: Swire Trust Go-Givers Program aims to encourage skilled volunteers to support Swire Trust NGO partners in education, marine conservation, and arts. From now until 2025, 10 outstanding volunteers will be selected annually as the 'Swire Trust Go-Givers of the Year' with special and empowering rewards. 40 volunteers who contribute the highest number of hours annually will also be recognised!
